    11	export function FootnoteSectionRenderer({
    12	  definitions,
    13	}: FootnoteSectionRendererProps) {
    14	  const { displayNumberMap } = useFootnoteDefinitions()
    15	
    16	  const sortedEntries = Object.entries(definitions).sort(
    17	    ([a], [b]) => (displayNumberMap[a] ?? 0) - (displayNumberMap[b] ?? 0),
    18	  )
    19	
    20	  if (sortedEntries.length === 0) return null
    21	
    22	  return (
    23	    <div className="rich-footnote-section-content" role="doc-endnotes">
    24	      <hr className="rich-footnote-section-divider" />
    25	      <ol className="rich-footnote-section-list">
    26	        {sortedEntries.map(([identifier, content]) => {
    27	          const displayNum = displayNumberMap[identifier] ?? identifier
    28	          return (
    29	            <FootnoteSectionItem
    30	              key={identifier}
    31	              identifier={identifier}
    32	              content={content}
    33	              displayNum={displayNum}
    34	            />
    35	          )
    36	        })}
    37	      </ol>
    38	    </div>
    39	  )
    40	}

    51	  const targetId = `footnote-${identifier}`
    52	  const refId = `footnote-ref-${identifier}`
    53	
    54	  const handleBackClick = useCallback(
    55	    (e: MouseEvent<HTMLAnchorElement>) => {
    56	      e.preventDefault()
    57	      const refElement = document.getElementById(refId)
    58	      if (!refElement) return

    63	      }, 1200)

    65	    [refId],
    66	  )
    67	
    68	  return (

     1	import type { FC, ReactNode } from 'react'

     3	export interface DialogStackItemProps {
     4	  title?: ReactNode
     5	  description?: ReactNode
     6	  content: FC<{ dismiss: () => void }>
     7	  className?: string
     8	  portalClassName?: string
     9	  theme?: 'light' | 'dark'
    10	  showCloseButton?: boolean
    11	  clickOutsideToDismiss?: boolean
    12	}
    13	
    14	export interface DialogStackItem extends DialogStackItemProps {
    15	  id: string
    16	  open: boolean
    17	}
    18	
    19	let stack: DialogStackItem[] = []
    20	let idCounter = 0
    21	const listeners = new Set<() => void>()
    22	
    23	function emit() {
    24	  for (const fn of listeners) fn()
    25	}
    26	
    27	export function subscribe(fn: () => void) {
    28	  listeners.add(fn)
    29	  return () => {
    30	    listeners.delete(fn)
    31	  }
    32	}
    33	
    34	export function getSnapshot(): DialogStackItem[] {
    35	  return stack
    36	}
    37	
    38	export function presentDialog(props: DialogStackItemProps): () => void {
    39	  const id = `dialog-${++idCounter}`
    40	  stack = [...stack, { ...props, id, open: true }]
    41	  emit()
    42	  return () => dismissDialog(id)
    43	}
    44	
    45	export function removeDialog(id: string) {
    46	  stack = stack.filter((item) => item.id !== id)
    47	  emit()
    48	}
    49	
    50	export function dismissDialog(id: string) {
    51	  stack = stack.map((item) =>
    52	    item.id === id ? { ...item, open: false } : item,
    53	  )
    54	  emit()
    55	}
    56	
    57	export function dismissTopDialog() {
    58	  for (let i = stack.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
    59	    if (stack[i].open) {
    60	      dismissDialog(stack[i].id)
    61	      return
    62	    }
    63	  }
    64	}
    65	
    66	export function dismissAllDialogs() {
    67	  stack = stack.map((item) => ({ ...item, open: false }))
    68	  emit()
    69	}

   369	export const GalleryEditRenderer: FC<GalleryRendererProps> = ({

   373	  onLayoutChange,

   375	  const { className: portalClassName } = usePortalTheme()
   376	  const theme = useColorScheme()
   377	
   378	  const handleOpenEditor = useCallback(() => {
   379	    if (!onImagesChange || !onLayoutChange) return
   380	    presentDialog({
   381	      content: ({ dismiss }) => (
   382	        <GalleryEditorDialogContent
   383	          dismiss={dismiss}
   384	          initialImages={images}
   385	          initialLayout={layout}
   386	          onImagesChange={onImagesChange}
   387	          onLayoutChange={onLayoutChange}
   388	        />
   389	      ),

   391	      portalClassName,
   392	      theme,
   393	      showCloseButton: false,
   394	      clickOutsideToDismiss: false,
   395	    })
   396	  }, [images, layout, onImagesChange, onLayoutChange, portalClassName, theme])
   397	
   398	  if (!onImagesChange) {
   399	    return <GalleryRenderer images={images} layout={layout} />
   400	  }
   401	
   402	  if (images.length === 0) {
   403	    return (
   404	      <div className={css.galleryEditContainer}>
   405	        <div className={css.galleryEmptyState}>
   406	          <ImageIcon size={32} />
   407	          <span>Empty gallery</span>
   408	        </div>
   409	        <button
   410	          type="button"
   411	          className={css.galleryEditOverlay}
   412	          onClick={handleOpenEditor}
   413	        >
   414	          <span className={css.galleryEditLabel}>
   415	            <Pencil size={16} />
   416	            Edit Gallery
   417	          </span>
   418	        </button>
   419	      </div>
   420	    )
   421	  }
   422	
   423	  return (
   424	    <div className={css.galleryEditContainer}>
   425	      <GalleryRenderer images={images} layout={layout} />
   426	      <button
   427	        type="button"
   428	        className={css.galleryEditOverlay}
   429	        onClick={handleOpenEditor}
   430	      >
   431	        <span className={css.galleryEditLabel}>
   432	          <Pencil size={16} />
   433	          Edit Gallery
   434	        </span>
   435	      </button>
   436	    </div>
   437	  )
   438	}

   388	export const MermaidEditRenderer: FC<MermaidRendererProps> = ({
   389	  content,
   390	  onContentChange,
   391	}) => {

   393	  const { loading, error, imgSrc, width, height } = useMermaidRender(content)
   394	  const { className: portalClassName } = usePortalTheme()
   395

   397	    if (!onContentChange) return
   398	    presentDialog({

   402	          onSave={onContentChange}

   411	      clickOutsideToDismiss: false,
   412	    })
   413	  }, [onContentChange, content, portalClassName, colorScheme])
   414	
   415	  if (loading) {
   416	    return <div className={css.mermaidLoading}>Mermaid Loading</div>
   417	  }
   418	
   419	  if (!imgSrc) {
   420	    return <div className={css.mermaidError}>{error || 'Render failed'}</div>
   421	  }
   422	
   423	  return (
   424	    <div className={css.mermaidContainer}>

   427	          Edit
   428	        </span>
   429	      )}
   430	      <TransformWrapper initialScale={1} minScale={0.5} maxScale={4}>
   431	        <ZoomControls />
   432	        <TransformComponent
   433	          wrapperStyle={{ width: '100%' }}
   434	          contentStyle={{
   435	            width: '100%',
   436	            display: 'flex',
   437	            justifyContent: 'center',
   438	          }}
   439	        >
   440	          <img
   441	            src={imgSrc}
   442	            alt="Mermaid diagram"
   443	            width={width}
   444	            height={height}
   445	          />
   446	        </TransformComponent>
   447	      </TransformWrapper>
   448	    </div>
   449	  )
   450	}

    19	const CloseIcon: FC = () => <X />

    21	const DialogStackEntry: FC<{
    22	  item: DialogStackItem
    23	  index: number

    25	  const {
    26	    id,
    27	    open,
    28	    title,

    48	
    49	  const zIndex = 50 + index
    50	
    51	  return (

    55	      onOpenChange={(open) => {

    57	      }}

    63	              className={css.backdrop}
    64	              style={{ zIndex }}
    65	            />
    66	            <DialogPrimitive.Popup
    67	              data-theme={theme}
    68	              suppressHydrationWarning
    69	              className={`${css.popup}${className ? ` ${className}` : ''}`}
    70	              style={{ zIndex: zIndex + 1 }}
    71	            >
    72	              {(title || description) && (

    74	                  {title && (
    75	                    <DialogPrimitive.Title className={css.title}>
    76	                      {title}
    77	                    </DialogPrimitive.Title>
    78	                  )}
    79	                  {description && (

    81	                      {description}
    82	                    </DialogPrimitive.Description>
    83	                  )}
    84	                </div>
    85	              )}

    87	              {showCloseButton && (

    89	                  <CloseIcon />
    90	                </DialogPrimitive.Close>
    91	              )}
    92	            </DialogPrimitive.Popup>
    93	          </PortalThemeWrapper>
    94	        </PortalThemeProvider>
    95	      </DialogPrimitive.Portal>
    96	    </DialogPrimitive.Root>
    97	  )
    98	}
    99	
   100	export const DialogStackProvider: FC<PropsWithChildren> = ({ children }) => {

   102	
   103	  return (

   110	  )

+
+function NestedDocDialogContent({
+  contentEditor,
+  onDismiss,
+}: {
+  contentEditor: LexicalEditor
+  onDismiss: () => void
+}) {
+  return (
+    <div style={{ padding: '16px' }}>
+      <LexicalNestedComposer initialEditor={contentEditor}>
+        <RichTextPlugin
+          contentEditable={
+            <ContentEditable
+              className="rich-nested-doc-content-editable"
+              style={{ outline: 'none', minHeight: '300px' }}
+            />
+          }
+          ErrorBoundary={LexicalErrorBoundary}
+        />
+        <ListPlugin />
+        <LinkPlugin />
+      </LexicalNestedComposer>
+      <div
+        style={{
+          display: 'flex',
+          justifyContent: 'flex-end',
+          gap: '8px',
+          marginTop: '16px',
+        }}

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>

</details></think>

_**Agent (gpt-5.3-codex 2026-03-06 14:59:27Z)**_

1. High: dialog dismiss does not reliably sync state to the node.
- In [NestedDocEditDecorator.tsx:64](<REPO_ROOT>/haklex/rich-editor/src/components/decorators/NestedDocEditDecorator.tsx:64), sync happens only inside the `onDismiss` passed to the `Done` button at [NestedDocEditDecorator.tsx:141](<REPO_ROOT>/haklex/rich-editor/src/components/decorators/NestedDocEditDecorator.tsx:141).
- But dialog close can happen via `onOpenChange` in [stack.tsx:55](<REPO_ROOT>/haklex/rich-editor-ui/src/components/dialog/stack.tsx:55), so Escape/programmatic close can bypass that sync path.
- This can leave preview (`contentState`) stale while `contentEditor` has newer data.

2. Medium: event propagation is only handled for the toggle button, not other interactive nested content.
- Wrapper click opens dialog at [NestedDocEditDecorator.tsx:92](<REPO_ROOT>/haklex/rich-editor/src/components/decorators/NestedDocEditDecorator.tsx:92).
- Only toggle stops propagation at [NestedDocEditDecorator.tsx:84](<REPO_ROOT>/haklex/rich-editor/src/components/decorators/NestedDocEditDecorator.tsx:84).
- `renderContent` can include real links (e.g. [renderBuiltinNode.tsx:117](<REPO_ROOT>/haklex/rich-static-renderer/src/engine/renderBuiltinNode.tsx:117), [renderBuiltinNode.tsx:122](<REPO_ROOT>/haklex/rich-static-renderer/src/engine/renderBuiltinNode.tsx:122)); clicking them may both open dialog and trigger navigation.

3. Medium: lint-breaking inline disable comment.
- [NestedDocEditDecorator.tsx:91](<REPO_ROOT>/haklex/rich-editor/src/components/decorators/NestedDocEditDecorator.tsx:91) disables `jsx-a11y/*` rules that are not configured in this repo.
